elements.content: Two page-start exclusion shapes occupy the left and right edges. The session resolves them into a centered constrained band, and opening actors are deferred below it instead of being forced through bad geometry.
First actor. This paragraph is deferred below the constrained band because both edge regions are excluded for the opening zone.
Second actor. Once the blocked band ends, the full page width becomes available again and normal flow resumes below the constrained zone.
